clues.clue: “Giant-killer” chants circling large pitch
Chef half-heartedly eating up cold chicken
Sadly, I’m no persevering late bloomer
Spot politician visiting Chequers, say
English ministry for energy on the way out?
Books of plants
Catch a break in detention
Pictures porcine masseuse puts up
Don’t start indiscriminate blubbing
Leader with long excuse for prorogation of Congress?
Maroon sweet a son polished off
When and how to litter horses about to leave the field?
Some nasty, erupting red swelling
Helmet and arms distributed in prison
Ladies’ man, after ET’s demise, gets upset
Coppers chasing one-over-the-eight idiot …
… after function collared Conservative
Underworld figure old pusher sorted out
Expel priest that’s popular in China
Energy source bachelor discovered in motors
Sweetener a court arranged with grass
Fancy priests in India with lace headwear?
Johnny Rotten supposedly was one in charts with a hit
Excited outburst bishop suppressed in power shower?
Struggle with support if leader’s lacking
Pacifist punched by Republican gets teed off
Live comfortably under Dad’s leadership
Organ one heard on the radio

competition.prizeinfo: The prize for the first correct solution to be opened will be an original edition of League of the Lexicon, the bestselling quiz game about words and language, created by Joshua Blackburn, author of The Language-Lover’s Lexipedia. The Collins English Dictionary & Thesaurus will be awarded for the next three. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is 23:59 on the first Saturday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Sunday Times Crossword 5206, PO Box 29, Colchester, Essex CO2 8GZ.
